Index.title: La Croisière Residence | Your exceptional apartment in Benin

about.title: The art of living
about.quote: The intimacy of home, the refinement of a 4-star service.
about.text: La Croisière Residence is a prestigious stopover composed of 14 unique units in the heart of Cotonou. It offers a secure and luxurious setting for business and leisure travelers.

longstay.title: Long Stay Discount
longstay.desc: Enjoy 20% off for any stay longer than 7 nights.

weekend.title: Weekend Getaway
weekend.desc: Complimentary breakfast and late check-out included.

reviews.title: The experience lived by our guests.
reviews.subtitle: Our residents' satisfaction is our greatest pride.

marc.name: Marc Traore
marc.text: An amazing experience. The staff is very attentive and the setting is simply sublime.

sarah.name: Sarah Lawson
sarah.text: Security and comfort at the top. You really feel at home with the services of a palace.

Footer.desc: Hotel excellence in Benin. A unique experience for your business and leisure stays in Cotonou.
Footer.rights: © 2026 La Croisière Residence — All rights reserved

ComingSoon.text: We are preparing a digital experience that matches the prestige of our residence. This section will soon be available to offer you the best of La Croisière.

Difference.subtitle: We simply took the best of both worlds. The intimacy of a true home, combined with the standards and security of a premium service.
Difference.originP1: La Croisière Residence was born from a simple observation: during long stays, a hotel room quickly becomes constraining, while a standard apartment sorely lacks services and guarantees.
Difference.originP2: We created 14 unique units where every detail was designed to offer you a generous living space with a real kitchen, while guaranteeing housekeeping, a dedicated concierge service, and absolute security.

args.title: Home Sweet Home
args.desc: Spacious and fully equipped apartments where you truly live, not just sleep.

args.title: Full Autonomy
args.desc: State-of-the-art generator and water reserves: here, the concept of outages doesn't exist.

args.title: VIP Concierge
args.desc: Discreet assistance and a high-end concierge service to meet your every need.

args.title: Cleaning Service
args.desc: Rigorous and professional upkeep, just like the world's finest establishments.

Difference.zeroCutText: In Benin, service continuity is a luxury we've made standard. La Croisière Residence has its own industrial infrastructure running in the background.
Difference.generatorDesc: Instant automatic switchover in case of public electrical grid failure.

Offers.title: Offers & Experiences
Offers.subtitle: Discover our curated collection of offers designed to elevate your stay. Bespoke attentions crafted to meet your highest expectations.
Offers.corporateDesc: Looking to accommodate your team on assignment in Cotonou? Contact our sales team to discover our exclusive Corporate rates and billing options.

items.title: Extended Residence
items.subtitle: Stays of 14 nights or more
items.description: Make La Croisière your home away from home. Designed for expats and executives on assignment, this offer guarantees the best rates and dedicated concierge services so you feel instantly at home, far from home.
perks: Priority access to the business center

items.title: Romantic Getaway
items.subtitle: A weekend escape
items.description: Celebrate love in an atmosphere of absolute elegance. We prepare your suite with delicate touches to transform your stay in Cotonou into an unforgettable memory.

items.title: Early Bird Booking
items.subtitle: Book 30 days in advance
items.description: Anticipation has its privileges. By planning your stay at La Croisière Residence more than a month in advance, you benefit from exceptional pricing conditions to fully enjoy the experience.

Reviews.title: Our guests have the floor
Reviews.ctaDesc: Your feedback is the heartbeat of our excellence. Take a moment to share the story of your stay at La Croisière.

Apartments.subtitleDates: Availability for your stay from {{arrival}} to {{departure}}.

ApartmentDetail.bookingNote: By clicking "Book", you initiate a reservation request with no immediate prepayment. Our team will contact you to confirm the details.
